Class ProfileResourceProcessor

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.rest.webmvc.ProfileResourceProcessor
All Implemented Interfaces:
RepresentationModelProcessor<RepositoryLinksResource>
public class ProfileResourceProcessor extends Object implements RepresentationModelProcessor<RepositoryLinksResource>
RepresentationModelProcessor to add a profile link to the root resource to point to multiple forms of metadata.
Since:
2.4
Author:
Oliver Gierke, Greg Turnquist

    Add a link to the ProfileController's base URI to the app's root URI.
